Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Deivis Ferreras vs. Saeid Ahmadi

Finish of the Day - Eric Pele v Antonio Silva - Bodog Fight

Video.summary: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Video.summary: Sean Michaels starts the day either training or in the sauna, but his favorite part of MMA is hard sparring! In this episode, Sean shares his tactics for the fight, how he evaluates his opponent and how patience pays off.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Sean Michaels
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Sean Michaels

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Sean Michaels
Out of the Cage - Sean Michaels
Out of the Cage - Sean Michaels

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Sambath Khun
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Sambath Khun
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Sambath Khun

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Sambath Khun
Fighter Profile: Sambath Khun
Fighter Profile: Sambath Khun

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 6
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 6

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 6

Video.summary: Chael Sonnen has trained with Team Quest, alongside fighters like Matt Lindland and Randy Couture. Tim Credeur has kept busy fighting on the US navy jiu-jitsu and judo teams, and making some cash in bullpen fights in Tijuana.

Video.summary: Sam Franchi moved from Venezuela to Canada when he was 14 years old. His initial introduction to martial arts came first through Jiu Jitsu. He eventually made a complete transition to MMA. He is the Hard Knocks Flyweight Champion in the amateur division and hopes to keep a clean record while working his way professional division.

Video.title: Out Of The Cage - Sam Franchi

Video.summary: At HK50 Jake Peacock suffered an unforntunate match ending injury to his eye. After his fight Sean Michaels is left with shoulder pains, significantly limiting his training routines. Dr. Murray Heber provides both fighters with techniques to stay as safe as possible during their training and fight preparation.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Sean Michaels/Jake Peacock
Video.title: After The Fight - Sean Michaels/Jake Peacock

Image.alt: After The Fight - Sean Michaels/Jake Peacock
After The Fight - Sean Michaels/Jake Peacock
After The Fight - Sean Michaels/Jake Peacock

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Tyson Haines vs. Cody Puls; Felix "The Cat" Jimenez vs. Steven Arens; Curtis Richard vs. Madison Mejia; Adam Zarrillo vs. Derek Lapierre.
